channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US, Iran, and regional mediators discuss framework to reopen Strait of Hormuz and ease tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump said a memorandum of understanding related to the conflict with Iran is already “largely negotiated” and could soon lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, one of the ...

item.title: Homa Bay boda boda rider dies after failed attempt to raise KSh 5,000 hospital bill for wife and newborn twins
item.description: A tragic incident has been reported in Homa Bay County where a 19-year-old boda boda rider, David Ochieng’, was found dead after struggling to raise money to clear hospital bills for his wife and thei...

item.title: Russia conducts large-scale missile and drone assault on Kyiv, including hypersonic weapon
item.description: Russia carried out one of its most extensive aerial assaults on Ukraine’s capital region since the start of the war, launching a combined barrage of approximately 600 drones and 90 missiles overnight....

item.title: Opinion piece links U.S. public health policy changes under Trump to concerns about Ebola outbreak preparedness
item.description: The article is an opinion commentary discussing a reported Ebola outbreak in parts of the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, describing more than 500 suspected cases and around 130 deaths tied t...

item.title: Ongoing joint security operation in Bannu kills 16 militants; two policemen martyred
item.description: Security forces in Pakistan’s Bannu district continued a major joint counter-terrorism operation in the Miryan area, resulting in the killing of at least 16 militants, including two key commanders, ac...

item.title: West Bengal BJP government revises Bakrid holiday schedule and restores working days
item.description: The newly elected Bharatiya Janata Party government in West Bengal has reduced the Bakrid public holiday from two days to one day, reversing an earlier decision taken by the previous Trinamool Congres...

item.title: Police seize P2-million worth of imported cigarettes in anti-smuggling operation in Lanao del Norte
item.description: Authorities in Lanao del Norte confiscated around P2 million worth of imported cigarettes during an anti-smuggling operation conducted in Barangay Tambo, Munai on May 23, 2026. According to police rep...

item.title: Collection of Early 20th-Century Cigarette and Cigar Advertising Posters
item.description: The article published by Vintage Everyday presents a curated collection of 35 advertising posters promoting cigarettes, cigars, and cigarette papers from the early 20th century. These advertisements, ...

item.title: At least 82 killed after explosion at coal mine in China’s Shanxi province
item.description: A major mining disaster in China’s Shanxi province has killed at least 82 people after an explosion tore through the Liushenyu mine shaft, making it the country’s deadliest mining accident since 2009....

item.title: Severe heatwave in India leaves 16 dead in Telangana amid rising temperatures
item.description: At least 16 people have died due to heatstroke in the southern Indian state of Telangana during an intense heatwave affecting several parts of the country. According to officials, temperatures in many...

item.title: Trump says US-Iran peace framework largely negotiated amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that a potential peace agreement with Iran has been “largely negotiated,” signaling major progress in talks aimed at ending ongoing hostilities and stabilizing ke...

item.title: River management as a cultural and ecological relationship in Tarashankar Bandyopadhyay’s Hansuli Turn
item.description: The article reflects on Tarashankar Bandyopadhyay’s 1947 novel ‘Hansuli Banker Upakatha’ (The Tale of Hansuli Turn) and uses it as a lens to discuss river management, ecology, and the loss of traditio...

item.title: Experts say zipper merging in heavy traffic can improve traffic flow and reduce congestion
item.description: The article examines whether drivers should merge early when a lane is ending or continue to the end of the lane before merging. According to road safety experts and former traffic officers interviewe...

item.title: Rape kit shortages in Cape Flats police stations raise concerns over justice for sexual assault victims
item.description: A serious shortage of rape kits in several police stations on the Cape Flats in the Western Cape has raised alarm over the ability of the South African Police Service (SAPS) to effectively investigate...

item.title: Police arrest suspect in death of village executive officer
item.description: Police authorities have arrested a suspect in connection with the death of a village executive officer, an incident that has caused shock and concern within the local community. According to prelimina...

item.title: TNT and Meralco prepare for crucial Game 3 showdown in PBA All-Filipino conference
item.description: TNT Tropang Giga and Meralco Bolts are set to clash in Game 3 of their PBA All-Filipino conference semifinal series, with both teams aiming to gain an important advantage in the matchup. The article, ...

item.title: Study Finds Garlic Compound Disrupts Mosquito Reproduction and Egg Laying
item.description: Researchers from Yale University have identified a chemical compound in garlic that can interfere with the reproductive behavior of mosquitoes and other flying insects. The study, published in the jou...

item.title: Five killed, ten rescued after building under construction collapses in Abuja
item.description: Five persons have been confirmed dead after a three-storey building under construction collapsed on Saturday morning in Durumi 3 area near Gudu Market in the Abuja Municipal Area Council of the Federa...

item.title: Police Arrest Seven-Man Kidnapping Syndicate in Katsina After Abduction of 8-Year-Old Boy
item.description: The Katsina State Government has commended the Katsina State Police Command following the successful arrest of a seven-man kidnapping syndicate believed to be operating within Katsina metropolis. The ...

item.title: The Criminal Career and Life of Bertha Liebbeke, ‘Fainting Bertha,’ a Notorious Midwestern Pickpocket
item.description: The article recounts the life and criminal history of Bertha Liebbeke, also known by several aliases and widely referred to as “Fainting Bertha,” one of the most infamous pickpockets in the American M...
